overview: Campus Wellness Compass is a student health and wellness web app for Indian college students. It features a symptom guide with first-aid modals, a water intake calculator, a wellness quiz, and an emergency SOS directory with New Delhi contacts.
features: Interactive symptom guide (Exam Stress, Dehydration, Migraine, Flu) with first-aid modals
Wellness check quiz with instant results
Emergency SOS directory with India-specific contacts and map
Student project credits and disclaimer footer
